subcodes.first_line: O my dearly beloved daughter! Your letter was received and its contents brought the utmost joy and gladness, for which praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز من نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت سرور حاصل گردید که الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @personal instructions
